channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][续作] Anime News Network Rent-A-Girlfriend 动画 Gets 6th 季度
item.description: New season adapts Cohabitation arc ― The staff for the anime of Reiji Miyajima's Rent-A-Girlfriend (Kanojo, Okarishimasu) manga announced on Saturday that the anime is getting a sixth season. The... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Rent-A-Girlfriend Anime Gets 6th Season

Japan announced on Friday that the second cours (quarter of a year) of Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star-, the new anime of Tetsuo Hara's landmark... | 来源: ANN | 原文: New Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star- Anime's 2nd Part Premieres in 2027

item.title: Anime News Network Webtoon Lumine to Receive Animated Series From Webtoon Productions, OuiDo! Productions
item.description: Originally serialized on WEBTOON from 2017 to 2024, Lumine has amassed more than 550 million views on the platform. ― Webtoon Entertainment's Webtoon Productions announced on June 21 it has partnered... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Webtoon Lumine to Receive Animated Series From Webtoon Productions, OuiDo! Productions
